ProFields

PreviousNext

Standalone field primitives for forms — Input, Password, Textarea, Digit, Select, DatePicker, Upload, Captcha, ArrayField, ObjectField, and more.

Installation#

Usage#

Every field is a plain React/shadcn component. Simple fields preserve the underlying shadcn/ui prop surface where practical; shadcn-pro adds only small behaviors such as allowClear, prefix/suffix slots, options mapping, and composed field layouts. Formily adapters live under pro-form/formily-fields, so schema-driven forms can use the same field primitives without making the base fields depend on Formily.

For schema-driven forms, install pro-form and import the Formily adapters from pro-form/formily-fields.

FacetedFilter#

A Popover + Checkbox filter component designed for faceted search — auto-used by ProTable when meta.filters is set on a column, and available standalone for forms or custom toolbars. Supports single-select and multi-select modes.

API Reference#

PropTypeDefaultDescription
valuestring | string[]—Controlled selected value(s)
onChange(value: string | string[] | undefined) => void—Change handler
options{ label: string; value: string; icon?: ComponentType }[][]Filter options
placeholderstring'Filter...'Button label / search placeholder
mode'single' | 'multi''multi'Single-select (radio-like) or multi-select (checkbox)
classNamestring—Additional CSS classes

Captcha#

API Reference#

PropTypeDefaultDescription
valuestring—Controlled input value
onChange(e) => void—Input change handler
onRefresh() => void—Called when refresh button clicked
captchaUrlstring—Image URL for image captcha; when provided, the visual captcha is shown after the input.
captchaTextstring—Text to display as visual captcha; when provided, the visual captcha is shown after the input.
buttonTextstring'Get code'Text for the trailing send-code button when no visual captcha is provided.
countdownnumber60Countdown seconds after clicking the trailing send-code button. Set 0 to disable countdown.
placeholderstring'Enter captcha'Input placeholder
disabledbooleanfalseDisable interaction
inputClassNamestring—Additional className for the input.
buttonClassNamestring—Additional className for the trailing send-code button.
classNamestring—Additional CSS classes

Use FormilyCaptcha for Formily schema integration.

Core Fields#

The following fields cover the full ProFields surface. Use the standalone field primitives directly, or use the matching Formily adapter from pro-form/formily-fields when building schema-driven forms.

Input#

Textarea#

Password#

Digit#

DigitRange#

~

Money#

$
€
¥

Select#

Input and Select support allowClear. Clearing Select sends undefined so Formily can return to an empty value.

Checkbox#

Switch#

Radio#

ArrayField#

Drag-to-reorder list with built-in state management. Supports controlled (value + onChange) and uncontrolled (defaultValue) usage.

PropTypeDefaultDescription
valueTItem[]—Controlled array value
onChange(value: TItem[]) => void—Called on any change
defaultValueTItem[][]Initial value (uncontrolled)
newItem() => TItem() => ''Factory for blank items
renderItem(item, index, helpers) => ReactNode—Render each item; helpers: update, remove
addTextReactNode'Add item'Add button label
maxnumber—Hide Add button when reached
minnumber0Hide Remove button when at minimum
disabledbooleanfalseDisables all controls

ObjectField#

Lightweight fieldset with title, description, action slot, collapsible support, and two visual variants.

Profile

Your public display information.

Advanced settings

Only change if you know what you're doing.

PropTypeDefaultDescription
titleReactNode—Section heading
descriptionReactNode—Helper text below title
actionReactNode—Element rendered to the right of the title
variant'separated' | 'bordered' | 'none''separated'Visual style
collapsiblebooleanfalseWhether section can be toggled
defaultOpenbooleantrueInitial open state when collapsible
